article_meta.title: Cartoon Carousel The nation’s cartoonists on the week in politics Every week political cartoonists throughout the countr

reasoning: Strong compliance with attribution and mostly accurate labeling of clear author-level bias. However, it missed several additional biased phrasings in the author’s prose and one flagged item is somewhat debatable.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: All flagged items are in the author’s own prose; no quoted or attributed source language was flagged.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Most items are defensibly biased author framing. One is borderline ('largely fictional copy') given subsequent substantiation in the article.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed multiple additional biased phrasings in author voice (e.g., 'complete agreement: McCarthyism is back,' 'hard-knuckled tactics,' 'humiliated Joe,' 'wild accusation was a bridge too far,' 'unscrupulous investigations,' 'perpetually restless and combative Joe,' 'rattled McCarthy').
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Labels are largely appropriate (Spin vs. Sensationalism overlaps are acceptable); minor debatable labeling but nothing clearly wrong.
